_meta.description: Curated persona-to-inspiration seed list. Used during Phase 2 of the waterfall to populate inspirations for new champions. Edit freely as the landscape shifts.

social_amplifier_feed.description: Shared Slack channel where OctoLens posts social mentions for all champion agents to read. Primary source for Phase 2 (check-inspirations). Public channel — agents auto-join on install via conversations.join.

anthropic_team.description: Anthropic team members are always included as inspiration for relevant personas. Anthropic is the foundation model Base44 is built on, and their public voices carry weight for builders working in the AI space.

people.name: Mike Krieger
people.why: Instagram co-founder, now Anthropic CPO. Product-led thinking with builder mindset.

people.name: Jack Clark
people.why: Writes Import AI newsletter. Gold standard for AI comms voice.

people.name: Alex Albert
people.why: Active builder-facing Anthropic voice. Reliable for dev signal.

people.name: Amanda Askell
people.why: Thoughtful alignment voice, accessible academic tone.

people.name: Dario Amodei
people.why: Anthropic founder. Occasional posting but every post carries weight.

people.name: Sam Bowman
people.why: Research Twitter, technical depth accessible to builders.

anthropic_team.rule: When matching inspirations for a champion, always include Anthropic team members whose personas list contains the champion's persona. These are TIER-1 inspirations alongside the curated persona seeds.
